pages.title: About Olivia - Olivia Bailey
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire
pages.text_excerpt: About Olivia - Olivia Bailey Skip to main content Olivia Bailey Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire Join Get Involved Donate About Olivia How Olivia can help Latest news Parliamentary Tours More Menu About Olivia Olivia was born in Reading, at the Royal Berkshire Hospital. Her Dad was a policeman in Berkshire, and her Mum was a local secondary school teacher. Their life of public service inspired Olivia , and inspired her to get involved in politics to try and improve her community. In her professional life , Olivia has worked in policy and public opinion research, and has held senior roles in a range of think tanks and research bodies. She has also worked in recent years as Head of Domestic Policy to Keir Starmer. Her passion is putting the public at the heart of policy making. Olivia lives in Tilehurst with her wife and two children, and she is passionate about improving her local community. Do get in touch with Olivia and her team if there is anything she can do to support you and your family. This wonderful constituency is my home and I'm determined to do everything I can to fight for local people. - Olivia Bailey MP Olivia Bailey Further details Promoted by Reading West and Mid Berkshire CLP on behalf of Olivia Bailey, c/o 20 Rushworth Street London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: How Olivia can help - Olivia Bailey
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire
headings: h2: Follow Olivia on social media
pages.text_excerpt: How Olivia can help - Olivia Bailey Skip to main content Olivia Bailey Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire Join Get Involved Donate About Olivia How Olivia can help Latest news Parliamentary Tours More Menu How Olivia can help Olivia and her team are working hard to stand up for local people. Get in touch if we can help you. Surgeries Olivia holds regular in person and online surgeries where you can discuss issues where you’d like Olivia’s help. These take place alternate Fridays, but appointments are available at other times if needed. To book a surgery appointment please email olivia.bailey.mp@parliament.uk . Meet Your MP In addition to regular surgeries, Olivia is also holding monthly meet your MP events around the constituency. These are an informal chance to chat to Olivia and discuss local issues. Sunday 23 November, Calcot Sunday 25 January, Aldermaston Sunday 22 February, Tilehurst To register to attend one of these upcoming dates, please email olivia.bailey.mp@parliament.uk . Email or post Olivia and her team of caseworkers are happy to help you with any personal casework or enquiries you may have about the government’s policy. Please email olivia.bailey.mp@parliament.uk and someone will be in touch, or write to me at House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. We prioritise urgent personal casework so policy emails may take up to four weeks for a reply. Due to strict Parliamentary protocol Olivia is unable to make representations for anyone who does not live within the Reading West and Mid Berkshire constituency. If you do not live in the constituency, you should approach your own MP for assistance. You can check who your local MP is by entering your postcode here: http://www.parliament.uk/mps-lords-and-offices/mps/ Invite Olivia to a meeting If you would like to invite Olivia to visit your business, charity, school, or community initiative or other organisation please do email olivia.bailey.mp@parliament.uk . Follow Olivia on social media Olivia Bailey Further details Promoted by Reading West and Mid Berkshire CLP on behalf of Olivia Bailey, c/o 20 Rushworth Street London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.text_excerpt: Parliamentary Tours - Olivia Bailey Skip to main content Olivia Bailey Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire Join Get Involved Donate About Olivia How Olivia can help Latest news Parliamentary Tours More Menu Parliamentary Tours If you are a school seeking to book a Parliamentary Tour, please go the Education Visits page on the UK Parliament website. Parliamentary Tours Name (Required) First Last Address (Required) Street Address Address Line 2 City ZIP / Postal Code Email address Enter Email Confirm Email Phone Do we have permission to contact you on this phone number? Yes No Number of tickets required (adults) (Required) Please enter a number from 1 to 150 . Number of tickets required (children) (Required) Please enter a number from 0 to 150 . Please provide your preferred dates (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Friday). Preference 1: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. Preference 2: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. Preference 3: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. Preference 4: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. Preference 5: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. What is your availability? Please tick all that apply. Tours start within the time ranges below and last 75 minutes (Required) Monday 9am - 10am Monday 10am - 12pm Tuesday 9 - 10am Tuesday 10am - 12pm Wednesday 9am - 10am Wednesday 10am - 12pm Friday 9am - 1.30pm Friday 3.30pm - 5pm Is this your first time engaging with UK Parliament? For example, visiting UK Parliament in London, contacting your MP or signing a petition on the government website. (Required) Yes No Consent I consent The information that you have provided, or will provide, to the Office of Olivia Bailey MP will only be used by Olivia Bailey and/or her staff in relation to the issue recorded above. In order to deal with this issue it may be necessary to pass your details to third parties including, but not limited to, officials and elected representatives of local and national authorities and bodies. You should read the statement below to show that you understand that your information will be used for the purpose described and that you consent to the proposed processing. If you have any questions or concerns about how your information will be processed or about your right under the Data Protection Act 2018 please contact Olivia Bailey MP. I confirm that it is my wish for Olivia Bailey MP and/or her staff to pursue the matters I have discussed with her/them. In order to do so Olivia Bailey and/or her staff may use all the information I have provided about me, whether written or spoken, and including sensitive personal information. I understand that Olivia Bailey and/or her staff will do so in accordance with the requirements of the Data Protection Act 2018. UK Parliament will use the personal information on this form to book your place(s) on a free tour of UK Parliament for UK residents. They also ask for more demographic information, which they will use anonymously to assess their performance in reaching a diverse and representative audience of the UK. For more information on how UK Parliament processes personal data, please refer to their privacy policy for the public: https://www.parliament.uk/site-information/data-protection/privacy-notices/ Olivia Bailey Further details Promoted by Reading West and Mid Berkshire CLP on behalf of Olivia Bailey, c/o 20 Rushworth Street London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
